◎简　　介  

　　Charlotte Church turns her attention to television to host her very own Friday night entertainment series.The Charlotte Church Show features a mix of celebrity guests, sketches, hidden camera stunts and fun with the studio audience.The celebrity guests will join in with the studio shenanigans, whether it’s taking part in items with the audience or joining Charlotte in sketche...
